name: Microsoft Office Template Creation
notes: This rule detects the creation of template files for Microsoft Office from outside Office.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Microsoft Excel Template Creation, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Microsoft Word Template Creation
TD_list: APPLY Microsoft Office Template Creation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Microsoft Excel Template Creation, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Microsoft Word Template Creation
RED_list: Event name: Microsoft Office Template Creation
Event description: Detects the creation of template files for Microsoft Office from outside Office
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
